title: Scottish Fiddle Orchestra: Hogmanay Celebration
full_description: The Scottish Fiddle Orchestra — over 100 fiddlers, plus accordion, harp, and drums — performs their annual Hogmanay concert at Edinburgh's Usher Hall, ringing in the New Year Scottish style. The programme features an irresistible mix of slow airs, marches, strathspeys, jigs, and reels alongside well-known songs, building to a ceilidh-style finale guaranteed to get the whole hall dancing. One of Edinburgh's most beloved festive traditions.
ai_summary: The Scottish Fiddle Orchestra's Hogmanay concert at Usher Hall — over a hundred fiddlers, a programme of airs, reels, and marches, and a ceilidh finale. Edinburgh's annual way to fiddle in the New Year.
